violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. One employee must then register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Class list and application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/05/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The floor and wall junctures under and to the side of the 3-bay sink do not have coving. Space observed between the wall and floor. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. Once complete, an employee must register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as Certified Food Safety Manager. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded/replaced if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2025

The floor and wall junctures under/to the side of the 3-bay sink do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Additional employee(s) must register and successfully complete a course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen and at the counter were lacking paper towels. Paper towels must be available at all times. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Ambient temperature of prep unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. TCS foods observed with temperature of 44 degrees F. Temperature gauge adjusted and unit went down to 41 degrees F by the end of inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items (cans/bottles to be recycled) were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2024
